description_long: This is a modern, two-seat sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a neutral gray fabric upholstery. The sofa features three loose, square back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape, providing a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend from the base to just above the seat height, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary look. The legs are short, block-style, and made of dark wood, positioned at each corner for stability. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric with a subtle, fine texture, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame with foam padding for comfort. This sofa would be suitable for placement in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms.
description: A modern gray two-seat sofa with straight armrests, three loose back cushions, and block wooden legs. The upholstery is a finely textured, solid fabric, giving it a clean and contemporary look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, wide armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous back panel and the three loose back cushions aligned evenly.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and cushion depth, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the two seat cushions, three back cushions, and the symmetrical armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform back cushions and two loose, uniform seat cushions arranged in a symmetrical layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and rectangular armrests at each end, extending from the base to just above seat height, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs made of dark wood, positioned at each corner and slightly exposed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three loose, square cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a fine, subtle woven texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
